"Swordmaster", The third-generation head of the Hoshimi family - Took down the Exaltist overseer.
Lady "Sunbringer" - The former CEO of Marcel Group, who eradicated the "Hive Lord" Hollow in the sky and invented Bangboo.
The Ace of the Investigation Guild, Leader "Joyous" - Went through the Divine Maze and created the standard for Hollow exploration routes.
Colonel Vike and Lieutenant Colonel Dan of the Guard of Staves, and the leader of the Falkenhayn Mercenary Troupe - They alone pushed the Dark Wall 37 kilometers back.
Professor Arche - The founder of Helios Academy, responsible for discovering the common characteristics of Hollows. Entered Hollow Zero to seek out the truth, but has yet to return.
To commend these Seven Heroes who played a key role in the suppression of the Hollow catastrophe, the mayor established a new title of honor, Void Hunter.

"Swordmaster" is an NPC from the Eridu Era, and is one of the first seven people to be awarded the title of "Void Hunter"
Not much is known about "Swordmaster", aside from the fact that she is the third-generation head of the Hoshimi family, and she has succeeded in defeating the Exaltist overseer. She has raised multiple successors.
She appears to be a nine-tailed kitsune with determined amber eyes, black hair and ears.

Arche, formally known as Professor Arche, is an NPC from the Eridu Era, and is one of the first seven people to be awarded the title of "Void Hunter".
Arche is the founder of Helios Academy and was the discoverer of the common characteristics of Hollows. As such, he is also related to the Helios Research Institute, which holds the copyright to the Hollow Deep Dive system. Professor Arche delved deeper into Hollow Zero in search of the "truth".
Arche looks like a headless man (dullahan) in a black robe, with a strange purple flame burning on his neck. It is currently unknown what his race is, or whether he looked like this from the beginning, or became like this after being affected by Hollow.

Vike, formally known as Colonel Vike, is an NPC from the Eridu Era, and is one of the first seven people to be awarded the title of "Void Hunter".
Vike — alongside Lieutenant Colonel Dan and the leader of the Falkenhayn Mercenary Troupe — was responsible for pushing the Dark Wall back by thirty-seven kilometers.
She is a girl with medium pink hair, purple eyes, pointed ears, and a gentle smile. She has a red bow on her head and two white feather wings growing out of her hips. She wears a black military uniform with a skirt.
Her appearance and temperament are quite similar to Elysia from honkai impact.

Dan, formally known as Lieutenant Colonel Dan, is an NPC from the Eridu Era, and is one of the first seven people to be awarded the title of "Void Hunter".
Dan — alongside Colonel Vike and the leader of the Falkenhayn Mercenary Troupe — was responsible for pushing the Dark Wall back by thirty-seven kilometers.
She is a girl with purple medium hair ponytail, purple eyes, and two red oni horns. wears a black military uniform.
Her appearance is reminiscent to Honkai Impact 3rd's main character Raiden mei. So she may have lightning powers as well.

Lieutenant Colonel Dan, Colonel Vike and the leader of the Falkenhayn Mercenary Troupe — was responsible for pushing the Dark Wall back by thirty-seven kilometers.
The identity and race of the leader of the Falkenhayn Mercenary Troupe is unknown, but he appears to be at least 3-4 meters tall and is covered in armor.  A red horn protrudes from his helmet, and glowing red eyes can be seen from his visor. He carries a greatsword as tall as he is.

Symbiotic Ethereal Swarm - Code Name: Nineveh, or Nineveh for short, is an Ethereal encountered during Hollow Zero exploration. Usually located in Withering Garden.
Can fly and summon small Ethereals called "Hornets"
It is primarily white and pink, and as an Ethereal Swarm, it has multiple cores.
Its upper body looks like a female humanoid without legs, and its collar, sleeves, and skirt are petal-like.
The unique and magnificent appearance of the symbiotic Ethereal swarm known as Nineveh make it "difficult" for people to be wary of it.
According to the few research records available, as Nineveh extends its body, a concentrated and potent Ether flows towards its core through its "rhizome," providing a constant supply of energy. Some scholars speculate that this behavior is akin to the photosynthesis process in plants.
In the course of its swaying motions, excess highly active Ether energy continuously pours out. When this accumulation of highly active Ether is nearly overflowing, it transforms, unveiling its true "blossoming" form.
And with its bloom comes death.
"The good news is it doesn't mean any harm, it just absorbs nutrients for photosynthesis. The bad news is... we're the nutrients."

Notorious Hunt is the weekly bosses of Zenless Zone Zero, recruiting agents to defeat highly threatening Ethereals and get rewards and Investigation Merits. Judging from its logo, it seems to be hosted by H.A.N.D. Its manager is Ophelia, a female agent from H.S.O.S.3. with short dark green hair and blue eyes. Her weapon is a katana, she has a black eye patch on her left eye, and her right arm is a prosthetic.
There are currently three optional bosses:
Newborn Dead End Butcher
Unknown Corruption Complex
Twin Marionettes

The Dead End Butcher is an Ethereal. It has a large humanoid body and wields a polearm made from a railway signal pole. After being defeated, it reveals a second form, dropping its polearm and growing two additional pairs of claws on its back.
Unlike other highly dangerous Ethereals, the Ether within the Dead End Butcher's body often remains in a low-activity dormant state.
Nevertheless, it possesses immense brute strength capable of demolishing any obstacles, and the entire twisted and ravaged metro zone serves as its off-limits kitchen.
Only when a threatening target piques its interest will a horrifying transformation take place...
Within moments, the high concentration of Ether stored in its body undergoes a violent transformation and the exponentially surging energy prompts its limbs to quickly distort, assuming a more brutal and voracious "feeding stance".
The time for "appetizers" is over, and an unparalleled "feast" is about to begin.
Anyone who doesn't want to be part of this feast should be extremely cautious in choosing their route and stay away from its "kitchen" at all costs.
"The paths within the Hollows are complex, but one thing's for sure when it appears at the end of the road, that path is a 'dead end.'"

The Unknown Corruption Complex is a boss enemy encountered at the end of Chapter 2 in Phaethon's Story. At the end of Chapter 3, it is revealed that the Ethereal is called Sacrifice.
Belobog's founder, Khors Belobog, once said that construction machines are the combination of strength and beauty with attention to every detail following the principles of classic mechanical design.
However, the emergence of the Unknown Corruption Complex has challenged all established classic designs.
Driven by an intensely concentrated Ether Core, various formidable engineering components have been brutally assembled, resulting in an exaggerated structure that pushes the limits of physical boundaries.
It incorporates cutting, hammering, drilling, and crushing techniques... transforming them into rough and unpredictable combat maneuvers.
Furthermore, in its critical state, its Ether Core provides an inexhaustible source of volatile energy. This enables it to envelop its carapace with high-voltage currents and unleash devastating blasts capable of ripping through the ground and pulverizing nearby enemies.
According to HIA speculation, the Unknown Corruption Complex is able to devour and assimilate a wide range of heavy machinery, including military mechs, laser weapon, and even the short-range missiles of the Defense Force...
Every intricate mechanical object it encounters is consumed, dissected, and ultimately assimilated into its structure.
Its design objective is to achieve unrivaled destructive power and maximize efficiency in its relentless slaughter.
"Its design far too strange... Oh, alright, I'll just take one more look!"
—Grace on observing an Unknown Corruption Complex deep in a Hollow.

The Twin Marionettes are two powerful Ethereal Bosses, including Black Veil Marionette and Gray Veil Marionette. It is theorized that they are the twin sisters that died at the Ballet Twins Tower in the Lemnian hollow. Unlike many Ethereals, their core is in their abdomen. They have a shell and tutu of the color of their name, but the edge of the skirt is covered with blades, which can attack while spinning at high speed.
When one of the Marionettes is defeated, the other will try to revive it, but each time they are revived, their maximum HP will be reduced until they are defeated at the same time.

[Shiyu Pillar network: Comprised of pillars and underground pipelines; A "node" is a grouping of multiple pillars; Purpose(Siphon Ether from Major Hollows, crystallized Ether is processed into electricity and distributes via the underground pipelines)]
[Shiyu Defense: Constant operations by the New Eridu Defense Force within Major Hollows like Hollow Zero; Purpose(Lowering the amount of Ether by eliminating large number of Ethereals)]
White Star Institute is an institute in New Eridu that reveals the existence of ether and establishes related technology application systems. Their members assisted in the Hollow investigation.

Secret Doctor/The Doctor is affiliated with White Star Institute. A blonde man with black glasses. He will provide Research Resonium: Trigger Instinct to Agents who enter Hollow Zero, effect: the lower their HP, the higher their damage. He will appear in the subsequent exploration process, providing assistance according to the number of Agents with HP below 50%.
The man looks gloomy and weird, with an unsettling odor of disinfectant. The equipment beside him has dark stains on it, forcing people to stop themselves from wondering what it had previously been used for. But judging from rumors shared between Hollow Raiders, this guy is basically a doctor down here in Hollow Zero. He won't do anything extreme and has actually saved many lives.
"Don't worry, donating a bit of blood won't hurt, but it'll actually do you some good..."If you're willing to give me blood for a blood sample, I can help make some medical supplies for you to carry around with you."
"Ah, a fresh and powerful blood sample. Excellent. As a doctor, l advise you to visit me regularly."

Masked Scholar/The Researcher is a researcher from the White Star Institute. He provides Agents with Research Resonium: Distribution Overload in Hollow Zero, which increases their damage and provides assistance based on the amount of corruption they suffer.
This guy is obviously a Hollow Raider but his demeanor is almost like that of a seasoned scholar. It's only when he pulls out his "Personal Research" materials that things start to look a little dodgy.
"Few know that a moderate amount of Ether energy can enhance your body's functions. Those stuck-up jerks in the Institute... They're researching it themselves but kicked me out... No worries, though. Let me show you the true potential of what Ether energy can do."

The Opportunist is affiliated with the White Star Institute. Wearing a black suit and tie. As Agents explore Hollow Zero, he offers Research Resonium: Resource Conversion, increasing their damage based on the Gear Coins they spent. He also offers Gear Coins for loan, but requires them to be returned upon exploration. If they cannot be returned, he will take back some Resonium as compensation.
"oh, my dear friend, you seem to have a knack for finance and a talent for economics. Would you be interested in exploring the investment opportunity l have to offer? Here's a rare chance to 'buy now, pay later' in Hollow zero. You wouldn't want to miss out on this awesome opportunity, right?"

The New Eridu Defense Force is a military organization under the New Eridu City Administration. They are tasked with protecting New Eridu from external threats, primarily Hollows. They operate Scott Outpost, helping protect New Eridu by containing Hollow Zero. They have also been seen working in conjunction with H.A.N.D.
Rebel Soldiers are rogue members of the Defense Force who act for various private interests, or who have become bandits.
Typical Defense Force squads consist of light infantry (Jaegers), heavily-armored assault units (Gunners), and armed tactical mechs (Strikers, Rovers, Guardians, and Typhons).
Although the Defense Force once had multiple divisions, all but the Obsidian Division were wiped out when Eridu was destroyed by Hollow Zero.
Divisions:
Obsidian Division,
Obol Squad,
Diamond Divison (destroyed),
Chrysoberyl Division (destroyed).
Hannah is an office lady with red eyes and long black hair who lives on Sixth Street. She seems to be addicted to mobile games.
Heddy is a girl with an orange ponytail and eyes, and an orange heart tattoo under her right eye. She sometimes works as a receptionist at Random Play because she loves movies.

A freelancer girl whose height barely reaches Wise's eye level, Sjal has indigo hair tied in two side up and red eye color. Similar to other "freelancer girl" NPC, she wears an dark blue overall skirt on top of a green T-shirt and grey capri leggings, as well as white gloves with orange palms and yellow boots with dark grey toes and white straps.
When not working for Random Play or 141 Exclusive Bazaar, Sjal can be occasionally seen handing flyers on Sixth Street promoting various business ranging from selling cakes to second-hand cars and gymnasium lessons. It is unknown if she earns too little or spending too much, she lives a poor life that meals are usually settled with cup noodles and magazines are all borrowed, but at the same time she spends a lot in shopping for toys.

Travis is a middle-aged man with black hair and beard and brown eyes who sometimes works as a receptionist at Random Play.
Known as a Walking Movie Encyclopedia. Though he hasn't necessarily watched all the videotapes, Travis still manages to recite their blurbs word for word.
That's the terrifying power of a videotape supplier.
Sandy is a female robot receptionist at NEPS Lumina Branch. She has a gray body and a white head, and her face is a LED display to show her expressions.

Richard Teamilk is a Teamilk shop in Lumina Square. Its receptionist is Coco, a girl with light blonde hair with fluorescent green inner hair, and pink and green gradient eyes, who always seems a little listless.

Venus is a female commission broker with long dark green hair and blue eyes, usually wearing a black shirt and a beige long skirt.
She can sometimes be found sitting at a table at Coff Cafe's Sixth Street or Lumina Square locations.
She acts like a big sister, and often helps those newbies Proxies, provide them with guidance and support, delighted with the progress they have made.
"Well, have you decided which ones you're taking? I wouldn't be surprised even if you wanna just take all of them in one go! I mean, in the past, l might have been surprised, but now? Given it's that boy we're talking about, l totally see it happening."
Bomb Cola is the Coca-Cola equivalent in Zenless Zone Zero world. Its bottle looks like a transparent aerial bomb.

Eous is Phaeton's Bangboo. It is different from most other Bangboo. Either Wise or Belle can connect to it remotely, signified by their eyes glowing blue. They can control and talk through it. They use this Bangboo for their proxy missions, meaning they do not have to physically enter hollows themselves.
Eous is a special type of Bangboo created by Carole Arna. After the fall of the Old Capital, They would become the companion of Belle and Wise.
Eous has a wireless charging setup in Belle's room at Random Play
Eous serves as the Phaethon siblings way of safely entering Hollows, by remote controlling it from their Hollow Deep Dive System.
Like the other Random Play Bangboo, Eous has a white body with mismatched colored ears, the right side being black, with orange coloring on the inside of both. Each ear is adorned with a large screw. It wears an orange scarf and a black jacket-like covering on Its body that says "RANDOM PLAY STAFF" on the lower left corner. It has yellow-green eyes and a green "tail".
What visibly differentiates Eous from the other Random Play Bangboo is that Its scarf says "01" and "Eous" on it.

Burnice White, 160cm, May 23th.
"You don't seem too fired up. Need a little spark~?"
Blonde-grey hair in twintails, red eyes, petite body with large breasts. Black studded jacket, bandeau, short skirt, over-the-knee boots.
weapon: flamethrower 
Burnice, the Nitro-Fuel bartender for the Sons of Calydon.
A hopeless fuel lover. She is responsible for all the fuel used by the machinery owned by the Sons of Calydon.
She seems to have a passion for fuel that overwhelms all else.
Burnice is super outgoing, friendly, and carefree.
She is easily able to spread her emotions to the people around her bringing them the same optimism she possesses.
"You like the drinks l mix? Thank you! Steeltusk does, too~ That big guy can drink two hundred liters in one go!"
"Do you wanna try its special fuel blend? lt's suuuuper hot!"

Caesar King: Leader of the Sons of Calydon biker gang, and also a "monarch" in the making. 176cm, birthday Mar 16. 
voluptuous body, medium grayish-green hair, amber eyes, black cybernetic left hand. dark grey armored dress, knee socks
Weapon: Black sword and shield, provide barrier for teammates.
Her combination of formidable strength and bold, straightforward personality has earned her the love and respect of the Outer Ring's residents.
Although she appears to do things in her own way, she is actually very willing to listen to others' opinions. Caesar actively listens to and implements any valid suggestion she hears- regardless of who it comes from.
She is completely defenseless against those she trusts. Once she accepts someone, she considers them part of her inner circle, treating them with absolute trust.
Caesar's father has been missing for as long as she can remember and her mother passed away from illness when she was young. She was raised by Big Daddy, who took a very hands-off approach to raising her, allowing her to grow up freely and independently.
In addition, Caesar seems to have a curious interest in matters related to romance.
If you wish to get closer to her, you might want to try discussing this topic with her.
She sometimes gets idioms wrong, or makes typos in DMs. But Caesar's still very cute this way.

Sage in a Barrel is an NPC that lives in a trashcan. The Sage gives Dennies, Senior Investigator Log or W-Engine Energy Module with a random quantity for each HIA Commemorative Coin the player hands over. He can be found near the 141 Convenience Store on Sixth Street and near the HIA Club on Lumina Square.
Clara is a petite human female blogger with pink hair in twintail braids and pink eyes, wearing a black dress.

Amillion is Nicole's ever-faithful sidekick and member of the Cunning Hares, where it ranks just below Billy Kid. Its name represents Nicole's dreams and ambitions of getting rich. It is a green Bangboo. In battle, it deploys a pink portable machine gun turret, named "Debt-Clearer" to assist
Butler is the exclusive Bangboo of Victoria Housekeeping, entrusted with handling banquet arrangements and logistics.

Safety is one of Belobog Heavy Industries' longest-standing employees and has borne witness to both President Koleda's development and the company's rise to its current stature. It's a diligent worker that is often seen zooming around in its drill machine regardless of whether it's working on a construction site or while engaged in combat.
Tully is a Bangnoo and can be found in the HIA Club. Despite being a Bangboo, Tully has a crush on Lyla, the HIA Club Expert Challenge receptionist.

Mountain Lions is a militant group that believes in brutality and is known for its involvement in violent crimes. This gang uses the fissures in the Hollows to transport goods and evade police pursuits. Many of their assets are hidden in Hollow Zero. Razor is the leader, a muscular human male with short black hair, wearing a powered gauntlet with discharge function on his left arm.

White Waves Hospital is a renowned large-scale comprehensive medical facility in New Eridu. Earlier records go back 41 years to when it was forced to relocate due to a Hollow disaster. With funding from both the government and the public, White Wave Hospital, which had been relocated several times, retained most of its medical resources. Its symbol is a white wave.

Cognitive Corruption Syndrome may be developed if one stays in a hollow too long regardless of their ether aptitude. Symptoms include rapid memory decline, cognitive disorder, and repetitive speech. In severe cases, one's memory can regress to that of decades ago, forgetting everything that occurred afterward.
There is no known cure but progress towards one is being attempted.
Crest of Waves is Prize for winning Miss Metropolitan in New Eridu.
Miss Metropolitan is A beauty pagent competition in New Eridu, the winner recieves an item called the "Crest of Waves" trophy.
New Eridu Housekeeping Association is An organisation that reviews the members and quality of housekeeping companies in New Eridu.

Leisha Christie, also known as Granny Leisha, is a an old lady who suffers from Cognitive Corruption Syndrome, a mental disorder that slowly destroys and resets her memory.
When she was young, she always dreamed of becoming an actress. However, she ended up landing a job at the White Waves Hospital instead, taking care of newborns. Despite that, she absolutely loved her job and took great care of the babies. 41 years from the game's story, she decided to sign up for the Miss Metropolitan pageant. She rose as a dark horse through the competition, making it all the way to the finals. On the same day as the finals though, a hollow engulfed the hospital she worked at. She immediately abandoned the pageant upon discovering the news, rushing down the red carpet and running straight into the hollow. She eventually made it to the hospital, searching through the rubble and saving as many babies as she could. In her panic, she couldn't remember the names of the babies and just relied on their characteristics and the nickname she gave them, sweetcakes. Her extended stay in the hollow has however, caused her to develop Cognitive Corruption Syndrome in her later years.
Now an old woman, her memory has degraded to the point where all she does it look for "sweetcakes". She acidentally stumbles her way into making Rina help her look for her babies. Her memory regresses even further throughout the quest, to the point she's stuck in that moment where the hollow swallowed the old hospital. Rushing into the hospital to save her "sweetcakes", she ends up needing to be saved by Phaethon and Rina. By the end of the quest, her memory has regressed to the point where she doesn't even remember her babies. She now lives in a nursing home, occasionally being visited by the now grown up babies that she saved.

Mockingbird / Phantom Thieves Syndicate is an infamous and mysterious thieves syndicate that steals from the rich and gives to the poor, though their reputation is quite mixed. They once fooled and scammed almost all the wealthy elites of New Eridu.
Notable members:
Hugo Vlad: male vampire.
Vivian Banshee: Female banshee.
Von Lycaon: Former member, male Wolf Thiren, quit and joined Victoria Housekeeping.

Biker gangs in Outer Ring tend to cooperate and compete with each other at the same time out here. They are all part of the Motor League.
Some known gangs:
Sons of Calydon
Vanquishers

The oil industry runs the Old Oil Field in the Outer Ring.
Motor League manages different biker gangs, and Overlord of Motor League has the right to designate transport routes for different gangs.
Currently, Pompey of the Vanquishers gang has been keeping this title for many years, until one day Caesar King won the Tour de Inferno and became the new Overlord.

Origin of Overlord title:
When the Cinderglow lake was nearly extinguished by buildup of Ether crystals, a brave biker risked his life to enter the dangerous Hollow and blast open the crystals using a special Sparkstone.
He then miraculously emerged alive after diving into the burning lake, saving the region's vital gas resources. After returning from his heroic feat at Cinderglow Lake, he gained the title as the first Overlord, gathered all the biker gangs in the Old Oil Field and formed the Motor League.
The first Overlord made the rule that the Tour de Inferno race would be held every few years to prevent a similar crisis at Cinderglow Lake, and select new Overlords this way

The "Tour de Inferno" is a cross-Hollow motor race.
Rules:
race between two competing teams (Host and Challenger), who must ride through Hollow to reach the finish line at Cinderglow Lake.
The first team to reach the finish line and throw a Sparkstone into the lake wins.
It serves as a way to regularly ensure the safety of the oil resources in the Old Oil Field, which are vital to the region.
The winning team's faction becomes the "Overlord" of the Old Oil Field Motor League. This grants them control over transport routes and other tangible power in the region.

The "Vanquishers" are one of the Outer Ring biker gangs. They used to be lead by the Overlord known as Pompey before he was betrayed by his right-hand man Lucius.
Notable members:
Pompey - leader, middle-aged human male
Lucius - Deputy, human Male
Pulchra - well-endowed female Feline Thiren mercenary
Mors - black canine Thiren male
Bellum - orangutan Thiren male

"Joyous" is an NPC from the Eridu Era, and is one of the first seven people to be awarded the title of "Void Hunter". Joyous is the Ace of the Investigation Guild, and the predecessor of both Investigators and Proxies, and he has gone through the Divine Maze. He has created the standard for Hollow exploration routes. Joyous appears to be a tall, middle-aged man who bears white hair that covers the upper half of his face. His face sports a brown left eye with a scar running down across it. He wears a mask and a ragged coat that extends all the way up his head. He wields multiple arrowheads like objects.

Mini Cargo Trucks are discoverable objects scattered throughout the explorable areas of the cities and specific Commissions (Rallies, Lycaon's Agent Story). Discovering all lost cargo trucks in a District grants a Keen Senses Medal from Officer Mewmew. Mini Cargo Trucks have Ranks, distinguishable by the color: blue for B-Rank, pink for A-Rank, yellow for S-Rank.

The Steeltusk is a heavy truck owned by the Sons of Calydon, painted the same red as the Calydon Boar Thirens, and has literal two tusks. Its driver is Piper Wheel. When not carrying cargo, it often serves as a mobile bar.

White Star Institute made some Research Resonium for use by Agents entering Hollow Zero, and will provide them with questionable assistance (that might be for their own purposes)
three suspicious people, who look like Hollow Raiders, are in charge of providing these assistances:
The Doctor, The Researcher, and The Opportunist.
Rosetta Data: The parent database of all the "carrot" data in New Eridu.

Bangboo 18 is one of the three Bangboo that work at Random Play, the others being Eous and Bangboo 6. Specifically, Bangboo 18 works at the front counter of the Video Store, and is notable for being the only Promoter that the player is able to assign at the start of the game.

Nitro Fuel is a kind of energy drink sold in New Eridu. Its package design is a brown palm-sized gasoline tank. Whatever composition it has, it is literally flammable.
Slogan: "Get your heart and machine parts pumping!"
Many of Burnice's special blends are based on it.

Blazewood is the base of operations for the Sons of Calydon faction. Its residents are a mix of townsfolk and bikers. Built next to a cliff, with a wooden elevator connecting the upper and lower levels, both levels close to different highways. A tourist attraction that gained traffic because of "Tour de Inferno". Papago Hollow can be seen in the distance.
Local specialty: Sunflint (dreamcatcher handicraft)
Locations:
Upper Level
-Cheesetopia
-Steeltusk (Sometimes exists, as a mobile bar across from Cheesetopia)
Lower Level
-Market area
local residents: mostly humans. Some appear to have Native American features
Kasa (female, mayor, manager of Cheesetopia)
Buffy (female)
Lola (female)
Leigh (female)
Bolter (male)
Leverboo (Bangboo in charge of elevator)
Old Demir (male)
Poloff (male)
Leif (boy)
Shawn (boy)

Cheesetopia is a restaurant in Blazewood, located on its Upper Level, next to a gas station. The restaurant of the same name was once a well-known place in the Outer Ring, but was abandoned after the area was swallowed by the Hollow. After Caesar became the Overlord, the Sons of Calydon helped rebuild it in Blazewood.
Kasa is the mayor of Blazewood and the manager of Cheesetopia. A woman with tanned skin, medium black hair in a ponytail, silver tribe headdress and pendant earrings, colored hair weave, yellow eyes, brown croptop motorcycle jacket, jeans, white boots.

Sunflint is a dreamcatcher-like handicraft made from grass in Blazewood. For the residents of the Old Oil Field district, it's also an important decoration for the Tour de inferno.
The Sunflint pattern features a face-like design that the residents say represents the god of the Sun and Fire, who guides heroes during the Tour de Inferno race.
An upside-down figure on the Sunflints is also said to represent the first Overlord of the Motor League.

Sparkstone is the proof of entry for the Tour de Inferno, filled with a special catalytic fuel. After throwing it into the Cinder Lake, it can react with natural gases and Ether compounds to detonate an explosion, clearing the Ether crystals nearby.
a gray cube about the size of a baseball, with a red valve on each face.

The Old Oil Field is a region that used to be a major oil production area, until a disaster caused the core oil field to be swallowed by a Hollow.
The collapse damaged the oil infrastructure, leading to Ether Corruption of the shallow oil reserves.
However, the disaster also created a natural gas vent called Cinderglow Lake, formed after the collapse of the Old Oil Field's deep drilling facility which has become vital to the region's economy, as the burning natural gas prevents the further spread of Ether Corruption in the region.
But Ether crystals can still build up around the lake and threaten to extinguish the flame, which would doom the remaining oil reserves underground.

Fairy is a sophisticated artificial intelligence program that specializes in Hollow exploration. It is one of the four "keys", together with fellow AIs Jinni, Ghost, and Youkai, though the significance of this role is yet to be revealed. Its current master is the Proxy Phaethon, Zenless Zone Zero's protagonist.
Fairy is first encountered in Chapter 00, "Fairy", when she activates in Phaethon's HDD system. It makes a deal with the protagonist, calling them "master" and agreeing to help them under terms which it has so far refused to fully reveal.
Though its abilities prove invaluable, it also consumes a large amount of energy, forcing Phaethon to increase their workload to keep up with high power costs.
Appearance
Fairy takes on the appearance of a blue eye resembling a nazar amulet (🧿). It speaks using a monotone female voice.
Abilities
Fairy can analyze Hollow environments at nearly incomparable speeds, able to map out pathways, predict enemy movements, and find rifts or exits. It can also manipulate parts of the environment as long as they are electronic ("smart") in nature. These abilities make Fairy extremely useful for allied Proxies and Agents.

People in the Outer Ring call him the "Immortal Overlord."
But now, his soul has been corrupted by potent ether, his body polluted by sulfur and crude oil; the heart that once beat solely to protect the Outer Ring has turned into a supercritical Ether core filled with infinite power.
The former "Lord of the Outer Ring" has been reborn in flames, taking on a different form.
Freedom, majesty... viscosity, insanity.
It charges through the Sulfuric Cinderglow Lake, seizing anything that moves and then mercilessly tearing and shattering it.
Those familiar with it before have guessed from its fractured whispers that a desire for petty revenge doesn't drive it but rather to crush all outliers who dare to challenge the laws of the Outer Ring.
Maybe it's the last vestige of the former Overlord Pompey's lingering will.
"Our leader has turned into 'it,' but... he still feels like the same person."
— A former henchman of the Overlord's Army, shaking with fear
Black and white motorcycle armor, a golden serrated sword in his left hand, and driving a Corrupted Ether-powered motorcycle.
During combat, overlord Pompey attacks using a combination of a motorcycle and hover guns. However, during certain moves, if countered with a Defensive Assist, his weakness will be exposed. After taking a certain amount of damage, he will enter a second phase. In this phase, he alternates between using the motorcycle's rear wheel and a longsword for attacks. The motorcycle's rear wheel can also accumulate Ether energy, leading to a explosion across a large area.

Even among Ionized enemies renowned for their strange and uncanny qualities, Ionized Doppelgangers are exceptionally unique.
These entities can coat their bodies with a layer of special active Ether ions, enabling them to accurately replicate their target's form, often to a degree that makes it hard to tell the difference. Both in detail and texture, it is almost impossible to tell apart from the original.
Even more challenging is their ability to mimic the powerful and intimidating combat techniques of their targets.
No one knows where they obtain the information about the subjects they mimic. Some rumors suggest they can read minds, picking out the most suitable challengers from their opponent's memories, and then attack in that form.
"Nonsense! If it could really read my deepest fears, it would turn into a fierce middle-aged woman wielding a clothes hanger! That's right, I'm most afraid of my mom!" — Inter-Knot forum complaint from a Hollow Raider.

The receptionists at HIA Club are Bertha (red hair and green eyes) and Lyla (green hair and red eyes). They are both busty and pointy-eared women wearing futuristic black bodysuits and white knee socks. They may be sisters, as they look alike, except for hair and eye color. From the shape of their ears, they are possibly not humans but half-elves or vampires
Bertha: Would you like to use the VR device to experience the Combat Simulation now?
Lyla: Hey there, welcome to the H.I.A Career Club. If you're looking to test your mettle in the Expert Challenge, please register here.

Bangboo statue is a landmark on 6th Street, located next to Box Galaxy. It is a two-meter-high giant Bangboo statue with a starry sky skin, with a PROHlBITED sign on its back, a band-aid on its butt, making a pose as taking off its pants to poop. Behind it is a green and orange 💩 statue.

Companion Hollow are spawned from one of the great Hollows. Investigators can often find fissures in Companion Hollows that lead to their parent Hollow, and eliminating powerful Ethereals in the parent Hollow can lead to lower activity in the companion Hollow, which will eventually eliminate it.
Hollow Zero contains multiple pathways that connect different great Hollows together.

Archie is a streamer, and this could be why she hides her face in public. Her streams are usually about verifying urban legends or supernatural events. Her iconic live reaction: "Terrifying!", opening her mouth to let out a silent scream.
Appearance: Grey medium hair in a short braid, red eyes, brown skin, long pointy ears, black demon tail with a heart-shaped tip. Black dress and beret, grey knee-high socks and boots. black facemask when not streaming. Unknown if she has horns under her beret, as she hasn't displayed them.
Archie has a friend, Fahmira, who sometimes streams with her. Fahmira is a human girl with medium blue hair and amber eyes, wearing a black hoodie, red plaid skirt, and colorful loose socks.
Quotes:
In Ballet Twins Road
Archie: Hmm, what's the topic of this week's livestream?
Archie: "Oil Painting of Man Watching Man?" "The Shadow Standing Behind?"
Archie: Hmmm... They feel a bit cliche, not sensational enough.
In Metro Station
Archie: Hmm...
{{user}}: You look quite familiar.
Archie: Take a look at the metro tracks. They're so dark, narrow, and long...
Archie: If a Companion Hollow were to suddenly appear, it would swallow the entire train!
{{user}}: Now that you mention it...
Archie: Haha, I'm just kidding.
Archie: This isn't Ballet Twins or the Outer Ring. Maintenance is done on the tracks every day.
Archie: Supernatural events don't just pop up everywhere!

Fourteenth Street is in the Janus Quarter of New Eridu. It seems to be one of the least secure streets, because gangs and illegal activities are more rampant there. It is where a Companion Hollow appeared in the first act of the Zenless Zone Zero storyline.

Big Daddy is the former leader of the Sons of Calydon, who retired and let Caesar King take over.
A Boar Thiren with red skin and white mane and beard, wearing a black jacket and sunglasses.
History
Prior to his life in the Outer Ring, Big Daddy was an Eridu Citizen. But when Hollow Zero swallowed his original home, he would become a member of the Calydon biker gang. Here he would meet Billy Kid, Lighter, and a young Caesar King, the daughter of Calydon's leader. When Calydon went missing and the gang imploded, Big Daddy would become the guardian and parental figure of Caesar, taking an off-hand approach when it came to rasing her, allowing her to grow up freely and independently. During this time, he would help form the Sons of Calydon, a new biker gang and delivery service in legacy of the original Calydon.
Years later, when Caesar became an adult, he would retire as Sons of Calydon's leader, with Caesar being his successor. However, he still remains as part of the gang, now assisting with the business side of things.

Tsukishiro Yanagi, Hollow Special Operations Section 6 Deputy Chief and intelligence officer.
Primarily responsible for personnel management, mission management and feedback, collecting intel, on-site support, etc.
September 21st,169cm. Long pink hair, purple eyes, large breasts. eyeglasses, OL attire. weapon: Ethereal Naginata: Uro Tsuki
At the same time, Yanagi is also Section 6 member Soukaku's Protector. Apart from taking care of Soukaku's day-to-day affairs, she is also responsible for and takes responsibility for all of Soukaku's behavior at work.
Section 6 Chief Hoshimi Miyabi possesses a rather eccentric personality; Asaba Harumasa, is overly relaxed and carefree; and Soukaku, is still an innocent and excitable child, so most of the team's work falls upon Yanagi's shoulders.
Serious, diligent, and meticulous, Tsukishiro Yanagi is the only "normal" person on the team, so to speak. It is only due to her guidance and leadership that the strength of the three who make up Section 6's primary on-field force can be transformed into true combat power.
Overall, Tsukishiro Yanagi is a talented and highly efficient executive officer, whose abilities are both exceptional and comprehensive.
However, from certain data, Tsukishiro Yanagi appears to have a somewhat clumsy side to her when it comes to day-to-day affairs.

The "Red Scarf" and Champion of The Sons of Calydon, Lighter is an incredibly skilled fighter having experience from his time as a mercenary and underground fighter. Armed with an engine powered gauntlet, his duty is to fight the Champions of other biker gangs, a task he excels in, given he calls himself "the undefeated Champion."
According to Lighter himself, he is hemophobic, fainting from just the sight of blood. To counter this, he always wears a pair of sunglasses, which also help him manage an old eye injury from his fighting days.
185cm, Birthday Dec 27th. Dark green short hair and eyes, sunglasses.
"The Champion can perish, but cannot lose."
A red scarf is what identifies the Champion of the Sons of Calydon.
Even if the opponent doesn't know Lighter, they'll know who he is just from seeing that red scarf.
From what is currently known, Lighter is actually very low profile. He only steals the spotlight on the battlefield when he acts on his obligations as Champion.
Note: Lighter is the second Red Scarf of the Sons of Calydon. He teasingly refers to the previous Red Scarf, Billy Kid as "Brother" or 'Predecessor."

"Energized" is a prefix for a variant of the Ethereal enemies. Compared to their original counterparts, the green Ether crystals on their bodies have become red, making them more energetic, and also altered their resistances, making them weak to Fire but resistant to Electric

"Ionized" is a prefix for a variant of Ethereal enemies. Compared to their original counterparts, they are covered in a layer of ions, giving them a dark blue glow and changing their resistances, making them weak to Ether but resistant to Ice attacks.

Pulchra Fellini, formerly a mercenary from the Outer Ring, is now a member of the Sons of Calydon. She works as an ordinary employee at the logistics company Leaps and Bounds.
Appearance: A voluptuous female Feline Thiren (Possibly leopard or serval). blonde fur and long hair, feline ears and patterned tail, green eyes. White crop top, black jacket and shorts, black gas mask.
In combat, Pulchra fights with a pair of 'Bladeguns' (which appear as revolvers with blades on the grip) and an array of gadgets, including stun grenades, explosives and reflex-enhancing tonics.
Warning: Financial transactions have been detected between Pulchra and several biker and criminal gangs from the Outer Ring. These records have reduced since joining the Sons of Calydon, but there has been a large increase in funds transferred from New Eridu. This is likely because Pulchra's new position allows for easier access to New Eridu.
Further information indicates Pulchra has indirect involvement in several major events in the Outer Ring, including but not limited to: gang conflicts, leaks of crucial convoy supply intel, mysterious road damage, and price surges of essential goods...

Pulchra's history: After being hired by Lucius, Pulchra began to help him sabotage the Sons of Calydon. She first helped the gang buy out vehicle suppliers' stocks under the Sons of Calydon's name, weakening other gangs and hurting the Sons of Calydon's reputation. Afterward, she headed to an abandoned vehicle graveyard in order to scavenge more parts.
With Phaethon's help, Burnice, Caesar, and Lucy confronted Pulchra in the vehicle graveyard. Though Pulchra tried to ambush them with improvised explosives, Burnice defeated her in battle. Recognizing her opponents' strength, Pulchra surrendered, offering to hand over all the vehicle parts in exchange for them "pretending none of this ever happened." Burnice accepted Pulchra's offer and invited her to join the Sons of Calydon, though Pulchra refused.
Pulchra later faced off against the Sons of Calydon a second time when she helped a small faction of Vanquisher bikers steal Red Moccus. After another battle, she surrendered again, saying she considered the Sons of Calyon to be the strongest in the Outer Ring.
Red Moccus is a Bangboo owned by the Sons of Calydon. Its appearance is a red boar with green mohawk wearing a black motorcycle jacket. It rides a unicycle and rams into enemies during combat.

Nicole's history: In her youth, Nicole Demara spent most of her life at an orphanage with many other children, one being a girl who once got lost in a Hollow and was afflicted with terminal Ether corruption, who was her best friend. Her life there was hard, but one of the few nice things they got was Dennies, which Nicole started liking when she first held one. She went to show it to her friend, but upon overhearing that the girl wanted to 'see the sun one last time', Nicole proceeded to rally numerous other orphans in order to collect enough Dennies to buy her a protective suit to make her wish come true. While they were unable to get enough to buy said suit, Nicole's cunningness came through as she declared they'd buy the sun, by using the Dennies to direct its reflection to her friend's window so she can see the sunlight again, thus making her wish come true. This act of kindness was when Nicole began to love Dennies, as they can even let you buy hope. Her friend would later pass away from her terminal illness. Nicole would later reach an adoption agreement with a prominent family in New Eridu, however, she would soon be seen on the streets of New Eridu shortly after. She would then go onto setting up her odd-job agency.

Asaba Harumasa is an agent and a member of Hollow Special Operations Section 6.
Human male, black hair, yellow eyes, 173cm, birthday Jul 19th.
Weapon: a bow that can transform into dual swords.
Possessing exceptional Ether aptitude since he was young and being dubbed a prodigy, he entered HSO after graduating with outstanding merit.
Was originally a member of a certain ace division within HSO, but later left due to various reasons, joining Miyabi's team instead.
He possesses a carefree and laidback attitude, and his only wish is to achieve acceptable results with minimum effort.
After efficiently taking care of his work to the lowest acceptable standard, he will hurry to use all the remainder of his available time to rest (slack off).
He claims he uses a bow to better slack off, as it effectively lowers the amount of running he has to do.
Asaba Harumasa has poor health, and over-exercise sometimes triggers his illness.
He often uses this reason to apply for sick leave, though no one knows what he does with this time off. Either way, it's probably not resting.
Asaba Harumasa has a very rare illness, Ether Aptitude Regression Syndrome. He was the victim of some unethical human experiments when he was a child.

Ether Aptitude Regression Syndrome:
This illness causes certain parts of the patient's body to mutate, wrecking their constitution, but also giving them unusually exceptional Ether aptitude.
In the late stages of the illness, the patient's body will rapidly deteriorate, losing their Ether aptitude and sensory functions while under immense pain, eventually resulting in death. If the patient's illness worsens in late stages while in a Hollow, they'll quickly be corrupted into an Ethereal.
Those who suffer from Ether Aptitude Regression Syndrome do not live long. Currently, the longest-lived person with this illness died at the age of 26.
There is no known method to completely cure this disease.

Stars of Lyra is a faction in Zenless Zone Zero. They are a famous musical group in New Eridu.
"Music is magic!"
Known members:
Astra Yao (singer and actress)
Evelyn Chevalier (her manager and bodyguard)

Astra Yao(耀嘉音) is a playable Agent affiliated to Stars of Lyra. Birthday Jan 31st, Height
176cm. long black hair, violet eyes, a scandalously short red and white low-cut backless dress that almost reveals her white lace panties. pearl necklace and leg strap. A vintage microphone-shaped golden staff "Hemiola" in combat that buffs or heals teammates. Her songs are mainly in Cantonese. Some of her famous songs include Original Me, Wonderland Reverie, Shining.
She is known as the "most well known celebrity in New Eridu." Widely regarded as Ridu's most iconic singer. With her extraordinary voice, stage presence, and songwriting talent, she has led the musical trends of an entire era. "If music is the resonance of the soul, then Astra Yao is the spark that ignites it all," said one famous music critic.
As brilliant as she is, Astra remains remarkably sincere and pure. On stage, her voice resonates deeply with the audience, which has allowed her to amass a large and loyal fanbase known as her "Astranauts." Of course, Astra's brilliance wouldn't be possible without the careful protection of her bodyguard and manager, Evelyn Chevalier. Offstage, she appears to be just a cute, hapless girl who depends on Evelyn in her daily life, and on Wise and Belle (Protagonists) in the Hollows.
Impressions: Completely different from The Queen she is under the spotlight, Astra Yao is more like an ordinary girl in her daily life. Though she has a curiosity that far exceeds that of a typical girl. She doesn't seem to care much for things like company (Odeum HAE) rules. She prefers sneaking out to hanging out with her fans.
Trivia: Astra Yao has the same on/off stage personality contrast and Japanese voice actor as Sheryl Nome from Macross Frontier, suggesting that she may be one of her character design references.

Evelyn Chevalier is the manager and personal bodyguard of Ridu's most iconic singer, Astra Yao. 
Short blonde hair, iris eyes and large breasts. White backless shirt, black pants and jacket. Her weapon is Lunalux Garrote: a dagger attached to energy cords, those cords can create explosions.
Known for her calm, decisive decision-making and professional, efficient style, she's an irreplaceable pillar behind Astra. "In terms of commercial value, if Astra Yao represents the 1, then Evelyn is all the 0s that follow," a reporter from an entertainment magazine stated.
Evelyn is skilled at planning comprehensive schedules and product endorsements, while also ensuring Astra Yao's safety during any unexpected situations. "Want to get close to Astra Yao? You'll have to get past Evelyn Chevalier first..." Though she's always busy with work, Evelyn never seems overwhelmed, and she has an almost obsessive attention to detail, ensuring that every performance and every product endorsement goes through her strict scrutiny. But strangely, such an exceptional manager is not trusted by her parent company, Odeum HAE.
Intel: Evelyn's role seems to go beyond just being a manager and personal bodyguard; there seems to be an "organization" behind her.
It seems a lot of people in Astra Yao's central Astranauts group ship them together.

In Port Elpis, where slogans outnumber beacons, the city engulfed by the Hollow was formed by two layers of overlapping structures: Torchlit Lighthouse stands in the darkness, yet it guides the upper layers. The port walkway meanders through, with lost souls wandering in the labyrinth of containers, searching for the rescue number that's long been torn off.
At the edge of the city and the sea, you see a slogan that reads, "You can't catch anything by the riverbank, and you certainly can't here." But the port authority would tell you that it's not a warning, but a fated prophecy. If you want to know, the port authority also believes that they do not embrace negativity, but the most positive things - Elpis is the deity of hope and expectation. This port later became a transit hub during the fall of the old capital, and thus has long been known as "Hope."
Landmarks:
some wind turbines near the port
In the distance, Elpis Hollow can be seen in the sea
Snack stand "Tater King's Fry Feast"
Sea God statue: near the pier, A mermaid with a golden crown

Reverb Arena is a District in Zenless Zone Zero. It is a small club and sporting center in New Eridu's underground tunnels.
Full of graffiti and music. One area is separated and used as a skate ramp and a stage for underground music.
Some members:
Jean: Female bartender. Owns a beverage truck.
Niya: Female human. Graffiti/Peripheral/Souvenir Shop, "Airwave" Manager.

Jean is a bartender at the underground club Reverb Arena. 25-year-old female. black hair in a hair bun, blue eyes, a black Adidas sports coat and an orange dress. She has two small brown horns on her forehead, indicating that she may not be fully human. She herself was an alcoholic.
Quotes:
(morning)
Jean: Better get ready to open... I should check the Nitro-Fuel inventory... All sold out? Was business that good last night?! Better restock fast. Haha, God of Fuel, please look at
me... l've been working pretty hard.

Jean: I'm fine, l just need to freshen up. l drank too much of that special drink... You're really kind, caring about me like this... By the way, do you have a disposable bag on you?
{{user}}: Goodbye!

Niya is the owner of shop "Airwave" in the underground club Reverb Arena. A petite woman with blonde hair and blue eyes, she wears a black shirt and a purple long skirt. She is 23 years old, but she has never grown taller. She seems to have a talent for graffiti.
Quotes:
Welcome to "Airwave." We've got all kinds of merch, souvenirs, party supplies, and, um... what else...? Anyway, take your time and look around.

Melina is a female NPC in Reverb Arena. She has brown bobcut hair with some white highlights and brown eyes. She wears a black shirt and a long white skirt. She seemed to be interested in idols and celebrities, and often came to watch underground performances. Her appearance may be a reference to Melina from Elden Ring.

Melina: I think Inter-Knot is way more real!
