New Eridu has a fairly sparse elven population, but they have adapted to modern urban life, coexisting with other races.

Robin is a bangboo owned by Hugo of the phantom thief group Mockingbird. He is a top coach for Marcel Group and is friends with Coach Aster.
Robin partakes in Gilded Carrot Day alongside Hugo. Despite their round against Eous and Phaethon ending in a tie, he and his owner forfeited, as they had succeeded in their mission.

The Creator is presumed to be the leader of The Order (The Exaltists), who adore them as a deity.
Not much is known about The Creator, aside from the fact that the night before the fall of Old Eridu, Carole Arna was abducted by one of their hands while the Helios Academy was under siege by mysterious armed groups and monsters, presumably members of the Order; moreover, they have recently helped the Order to test Elixir P07, which is able to successfully turn humans into powerful entities known as Sacrifices. Members of the Order regularly invoke The Creator's name in a prayer of refinement as a form of blessing.

Null_Face is the name of a group of Hackers and Proxies, infamous for trespassing in the Hollows and falsifying Carrot data, then assaulting and robbing their victims, while also corrupting Hollow data. They were also regularly targeted by the HIA for Inter-Knot crimes, however would hack into the HIA to scrub their own criminal record, with conducting electronic warfare through hacker groups being one of their specialties. Despite their infamy, they rose to being one of the top-ranked Proxy accounts on Inter-Knot, following the downfall of Phaethon.
During the Special Episode: Virtual Revenge, Null_Face were the ones responsible for trapping the members of Section 6 inside the Virtual Reality program, in order to steal the team's deep sync modeling data and kill them, however, their plan was thwarted by Tsukishiro Yanagi and Null_Face were later arrested. During the events of Phaethon's Story Chapter 5: A Storm of Falling Stars (B), it was revealed that Null_Face were employed by Sarah to specifically target Hoshimi Miyabi, whose modeling data could be used to unsheathe Tailless, something normally only possible by members of the Hoshimi Family.

Irradiant Core — another shiny new term coined by the Institute, and one that inevitably means more reports piling up on the office desk.
Yet, the disaster itself is no exaggeration. The Irradiant Phenomenon seems to amplify the unique traits of Ether — though it also brings catastrophes of equal magnitude. Otherwise, Public Security wouldn't have requested such high-level support from HSO, especially after that incident.
The Irradiant phenomenon exacerbates Ether's instability but also makes its activity easier to influence. The Institute seized this opportunity to develop the Ether disruptor probe, a tool capable of influencing and even manipulating Ether to a limited degree. While its current applications are limited to connecting paths and altering terrain, it's already a monumental breakthrough.
The members of Section 6, though adept in both combat and strategy, lack in-depth knowledge of such advanced devices... Fortunately, with a Proxy's assistance, Chief Miyabi managed to forge a clear path for those who would follow in her footsteps.

The Hollows wield a power to warp reality itself, a power that naturally originates from Ether.
The ability to control Ether is the ultimate dream — not just for the White Star Institute, but for all of New Eridu. Yet, for all our advancements, we've only managed to reduce Ether to a fuel akin to firewood — a remarkable energy source, sure, but one that barely scratches the surface of Ether's true potential.
The Ether Disruptor Probe, however, offers a glimpse of that potential. It can untangle the spatial knots twisted by the Hollows, restoring spatial continuity. Or, to put it in terms Soukaku would understand, it's like rerouting both ends of a forked path back to a converged one. Then again, I'm not sure that analogy would make much sense to her either...
This Irradiant Crystal was retrieved by doing that exactly: using the Ether Disruptor Probe to forge a path forward.

Ravenlock is a family that used to have good standing within TOPS until they had fallen. The previous head of the family encouraged betrayal. The family worked off of rankings, and monthly assessments would be done to see who was number one. The previous head was strict; anyone who wasn't #1 was seen as a loser. Being underhanded and doing anything to get ahead was encouraged, even if it meant killing your own blood.
Hartman Ravenlock had made himself the head of the family by taking out the previous head  (Hugo's father) and all other children with the exception of Hugo Vlad who he assumed to be dead.

Feline Thirens exist in both in Thiren and Beast Thiren form, the former with only ears and tail as visible traits, while the latter is also completely covered in fur. When a feline Thiren gets positive reinforcement from aggressive behavior, their latent animalistic tendencies emerge; these tendencies are, however, temporary. Cats show a higher degree of friendliness towards Feline Thirens. They are sensitive to catnip, which makes them purr uncontrollably. They like fish and have a few dietary restrictions, for example avoiding tea milk due to its high sugar content, noodles for the oiliness, and any wheat product for how quickly they would digest it. They enjoy basking in the sun and the scent of grass. They have strong predatory instincts, enjoying gacha boxes (for their resemblance to prey in a trap) and games like hide and seek.
Tiger Thirens tend to talk at a higher volume than an average person would.
Canine Thiren have have excellent sense of smell and hearing.
Wolf Thirens are sensitive to moon phases, especially full moon.
A Shark Thiren's tail is strong to the point they might accidentally break someone's bones by simply swaying it.
Rat Thirens have rodent ears, a long prehensile tail, and have the tendency to rest their arms in front of them with both elbows and wrists bent, similarly to how rats keep theirs when standing.

Mayflower is the family that played a large part in building Eridu. They are the owners of the city administration / government. The head of the family is the mayor of the city. The Mayflowers are in constant struggle with the multi-company conglomerate known as TOPS.

Tessa de Winter is the widow of Joran de Winter, a musician whose work inspired the pop idol Astra Yao. After Joran committed suicide, a grief-stricken Tessa blamed his death on the studios who had warred over the rights to his work, Odeum and Fugue. Enraged, she resolved to take revenge on Joran's "murderers" no matter the cost.
Tessa chose to take revenge on Odeum and Fugue by sabotaging Astra Yao's "Astra-nomical Moment" concert at Starloop Tower. Knowing that Astra was one of Odeum's most valuable assets — and that Fugue was trying to take her for themselves — Tessa exploited the companies' rivalries, helping lure both their teams to Starloop Tower on the night of the concert. While Odeum and Fugue were busy fighting each other, Tessa sabotaged the tower's thrusters while it was in flight, planning to cause a crash that would kill Astra; the staff of Odeum and Fugue; and the concert's spectators, whom she resented for forgetting Joran so quickly.
Though Tessa's plan nearly succeeded, it was foiled by Evelyn Chevalier, a Fugue operative who was working undercover as Astra's manager and bodyguard. Having realized that something was amiss, Evelyn fought through both Odeum and Fugue's bodyguards to rescue Astra. As the two reunited onstage, Tessa revealed herself to them, using a powerful robot to attack them. After defeating it, Astra and Phaethon managed to re-align the tower's thrusters and save the concert from crashing into New Eridu.
After Starloop Tower safely landed, Tessa was arrested by New Eridu Public Security.

He is the late husband of Tessa de Winter. Joran de Winter was a famous singer whose work inspired the pop idol Astra Yao. He committed suicide, allegedly due to stress and despair caused by contract disputes and criticism from his fans.
Astra Yao's concert "Astra-nomical Moment" was to feature "Joran's Legacy", a never-before-seen recording of his final performance that he gave at a music store on Sixth Street.

Oni is a species in New Eridu.
Oni are a race of humanoids with demonic traits, like red, blue, or yellow skin, pointed ears, demonic tails, fangs, black-tipped horns extruding from their foreheads, and white hair. The lifespan of an Oni seems to be much longer than that of an average human, but with a slower maturity speed. Oni's liver has stronger detox functions than an ordinary human or Thiren, allowing them to eat unprocessed food without concern of adverse effects.
Unlike Thirens and Intelligent Constructs, they were not among the races listed for New Eridu citizenship. It appears that a group of rebel Oni fought the New Eridu Defense Force to try to gain citizenship a few years ago, although they were unsuccessful: both sides suffered heavy losses, especially among Oni fighters. Tsukishiro Yanagi, the one responsible for the last leader's death, gained the trust of the latter and was infused with her Oni blood, which artificially turns her into a hybrid with newly improved strength and thus inherited the role as a new Oni leader.
Though it is unclear what is the current status of the Oni species in New Eridu after Yanagi's takeover as the Oni guardian, it is known that the young Oni Soukaku was able to join H.A.N.D., becoming one of the city's protectors and amassing a fanbase in the process, suggesting that Onis may indeed be accepted into the city in some way.

There are some individuals in New Eridu besides Onis who have demonic features. They look more human, with normal human skin tone, height, and build, but may have features such as pointy ears, curved horns, tails with heart or arrow-shaped tips, etc. It is unknown if they are actual demons, their descendants, or something else. Given the diversity of races in New Eridu, they are all possible options.

Bear Thiren are a distinct type of the larger Beast Thiren group. Known for their impressive size and intimidating presence, Bear Thiren are often mistaken for dangerous creatures. However, the common belief that they consume intelligent life forms is a myth.
Bear Thiren share many physical traits with other Beast Thirens, like their high "Ether aptitude," which surpasses that of most other people. This attribute allows them to excel in Hollow-related jobs and activities, explaining why they are a top-pick for in-Hollow construction projects, with Bear Thirens comprising around 80% of Belobog Heavy Industries' staff.
Bear Thiren have made significant contributions to New Eridu, notably in the field of space exploration. Historical records reveal that there were Bear Thiren cosmonauts who ventured into space, showcasing their resilience and adaptability.
Bear Thiren are known for their calm demeanor and resistance to stress. They maintain their composure under pressure, a trait that sets them apart from many other species. However, their patience has limits. Unlike Canine Thirens, who can often be placated with food, Bear Thiren require more than simple gestures to calm them. When a Bear Thiren loses its temper, fleeing is the most prudent course of action, as they rarely show patience in confrontations.

Waifei Peninsula (卫非地) is a part of New Eridu's Throne Quarter. It's in a rocky mountainous area that faces the Throne Quarter across the sea. The original mission of Waifei Peninsula's residents was to monitor the Lemnian Hollow, known for its dramatic activity fluctuations. The name Waifei is derived from "protect" and "anomaly" from the phrase "protection from the anomaly called Hollows", Cantonese reading as 衛非 (戍衛空洞這一非常理之物)
Noteworthy Locations:
-Failume Heights (city area)
-Suibian Temple (Yunkui Summit)
-Aerospace City (ruins)

Porcelume (辉瓷, literal translates into Radiant Porcelain) is an Ether-resistant material mined and refined in Waifei Peninsula, Failume Heights, Aerospace City. Raw Porcelume ore is also known as Lumite Ore.
It is used to produce various objects, including Qingyi's body, Jane Doe's blades and Evelyn Chevalier's Lunalux Garrote.
Currently, the mining of Porcelume is monopolized by the company Porcelumex, so most miners are their employees.

Suibian Temple (随便观) is a temple affiliated with Yunkui Summit. Abandoned during The Fall of the Old Capital, with only a few disciples maintaining it, but recently reopened as a base and tourist attraction following the sect's investigation of Lemnian Hollow. During Season 2 of Phaethon's Story, the siblings will reside here undergoing training from Yixuan. They will also use their experience as store managers to run this temple, develop, produce, and sell unique Taoist products and send Bangboos out to explore and gather materials. As the plot progresses, new city facilities in the Failume Heights will unlock gradually to support Suibian Temple's management.
There are six types of products developed and sold in the temple: Wanderer's Gadgets, Herbal Remedies, Tools and Tastes, Meditation Essentials, Pristine Attire and Festive Props.
Notable members other than cultivators:
Belion: A Bangboo with motif of a stone guardian lion. Responsible for coordinating production and exploration schedules of other Bangboos.
A-shuo: A black dog, responsible for divination.

Failume Heights (澄辉坪) is the main residential area of Waifei Peninsula. The name "Failume" comes from the flourishing mining industry and the luminous sight of piled Porcelume glowing brilliantly in this area. Basically, a Chinatown. Most locals speak Cantonese.
The area is located in the mountains and faces the sea, cable cars are used extensively, one of which leads directly into a stable fissure into Aerospace City, a ruin in Lemnian Hollow to facilitate the work of miners.
Noteworthy Locations:
-Seagaze Road
-Yum Cha Sin (饮茶仙, a teahouse)
-Indestructibles (金刚钻, a tool shop)
-Coff Cafe
-Good Goods
-Devon Pawnshop
-BooBox
-Peace Herbal pharmacy
-Fluffy Pet Shop
-Old Capital Association
-Check Inn
-Mystic Wares
-Buyan Antique Shop
-Suibian Temple

Aerospace City is an location near Waifei Peninsula. Its ruins have long been devoured by the Lemnian Hollow, the Ether-stable area at its edge is still being used to mine and produce Porcelume.
Locations:
[Hollow] Former Employee Community
[Hollow] Rough Machining Center
[Hollow] Carefree Apartments
[Hollow] Former Research Center
[Hollow] Central Production Area

Pan Yinhu (潘引壶) is a male Panda Thiren. He wears a yellow Taoist robe and round glasses, and a wok on his head as a hat. During battles, his food provides continuous health restoration for the entire team. As a disciple of Yunkui Summit, he serves as both the head chef and financial manager of Suibian Temple. He's proficient in martial arts, and an expert in pressure-point techniques.
As the one managing Suibian Temple's money, he's a master at keeping costs down and can bargain a 5,000 Denny piece of meat down to 500. If he can make something at home, he refuses to purchase it at a store, and no matter which big supermarket or shop you name, he's got a coupon for it tucked in his pocket.
Thanks to him, the members of Suibian Temple enjoy delicious yet budget-friendly meals every day. As the head of the kitchen, he demands precise flavor profiles and pays keen attention to his friends' opinions.
What's more, given his years of frugality, it's safe to assume that both the group's treasury and his secret piggy bank have ballooned to jaw-dropping levels.
Being a Panda Thiren, an exceedingly rare sight in New Eridu, Pan Yinhu has scraped by on his own since he was a child. Only someone who's truly known starvation understands its terror, and to fill his belly he sampled every trade he could find. In the end, his remarkable Ether aptitude led him to become a Hollow Raider, when he had a chance encounter with Yixuan. Following a harsh beating and a sudden spiritual awakening, he opted to become a disciple of Yunkui Summit, where he now practices the mystic arts to cleanse his then-increasingly violent nature.
Because he joined the sect later than most, he actually has very few junior disciples — and you are one of them. As your senior, he shows his care by cooking special dishes just for you and constantly sneaking store coupons into your pockets.

Seed is a member of the Obol Squad, and an Intelligent Construct. He is also said to be a lazy person and a people-pleaser, and has offered to help Soldier 11 with her weighted push-ups. Although visually lacking a mouth, Trigger indirectly claims he can eat food, but is constantly changing his preferences. Seed is a humanoid robot, two meters tall, with a thick metal shell and word "SEED" and a barcode printed in black on his chest.

Orpheus is a member of the OBOL Squad. 16 years old, 158cm tall. She is a (possibly Dragon or Chimera) demihuman Thiren with long orange hair in twintails, long pointed ears, emerald eyes, black ram-like curved horns, and a black-red gradient serpent tail. She wears a black officer uniform and knee-socks, but in fact her rank is only Private First Class. While highly diligent in her work, she is a bit messy in daily life, often losing or misplacing things. Her room is always cluttered and she frequently has to dig through piles of stuff to find what she needs (in stark contrast to Ghostfire's obsessive tidiness). However, due to Ghostfire's supervision, her office desk is always impeccably neat. Orpheus is the daughter of Ghostfire's former most loyal friend and subordinate, who died during the Fall of the Old Capital. After reaching the age required for military service, Orpheus immediately joined the army and managed to become Ghostfire's assistant.
Ghostfire: A large-caliber cybernetic cannon mounted at the tip of Orpheus's tail, with integrated intelligent hardware, featuring components that emit light and sound-the former allowing the cannon to "speak" and the latter flashing when it does. It has a black and red mechanical dragon head design and a bayonet on its jaw for close combat. It can convert Orpheus's fire energy into powerful AP or HE projectiles.
Originally the captain of an elite squad within the Obol Squad, Ghostfire was gravely injured during the Fall of the Old Capital and transferred her consciousness into the cannon. She is a calm, charismatic leader, widely trusted by her team. However, being trapped in a cannon's body often leads to humorous moments as she struggles to convey her thoughts without being able to act herself. She has a touch of OCD and cannot tolerate messy work or living environments.
"Orpheus, please tilt my barrel 30 degrees to the left. Ah, yes, that's the perfect angle-now I finally can't see that chaotic pile of files!”
Personality Keywords:
Orpheus: Serious, diligent, a bit shy. She has PTSD from the Ruins, but has trained to overcome her fear when facing most Ruins.
Ghostfre: Optimistic, forgiving, and encouraging towards others, but self-critical and strict. Extremely calm, even cold, during combat.

History of Exaltists
It is unknown when The Order was founded, but it is safe to assume it was after the first Hollow disasters began occurring. One of their leaders, the Exaltist Overseer (称颂会司教 "Minister of the Church of Praise"), was taken down by "Swordmaster" immediately prior the founding of Eridu. It is reported that they were publicly active as a religious group before the Fall of the Old Capital, holding rallies in the open; however, it is unknown why they went undercover in New Eridu.
The Hollow Zero disaster seems to be tied to the Order, as someone attempted to retrieve the Sacrifice sealed inside the monument at Pioneer's Memorial Plaza the night before the Fall. On the same night Carole Arna was abducted by one of the Creator's hands while the Helios Academy was under siege by mysterious armed groups and "monsters". Moreover, their chanting can be heard inside Hollow Zero.
They were behind the attack at the Arpeggio Fault Old Laboratory two years ago, but at the last moment Alowyn betrayed the mission and instead saved the Institute researchers she got attached to, dying in the process. However, The Order managed to enter the Laboratory nonetheless, leaving a message behind.
The Order was also responsible all the major events encountered by Phaethon from the Prologue to Chapter 5. They have developed Elixir P07 to refine humans, with the direct help of the Creator, into their Ethereal perfect forms, called Sacrifices.

Hugo's mother appears in his memories, who seems to be an elf with gray eyes and long platinum hair. She never showed any kindness to him, but only used him as a tool to get close to Ravenlocks, and lived a rich life with the money after selling Hugo to his father.

Gilded Carrot Day marks the last day of the year in New Eridu, which commemorates the pioneering achievement of "Joyous," the first Proxy to successfully navigate and escape a Hollow using a self-calculated path. This event led to the discovery of the first "Carrot", stored within a prototype Bangboo crafted by Lady Sunbringer. This breakthrough enabled the transformation of Hollows from threats into resources, laying the foundation for New Eridu's prosperity.
Traditions and Celebrations:
Ridu's Got Boo Bangboo Beauty Contest: Held one week before Gilded Carrot Day, to choose the Bangboo for Yearlight Ceremony. Hosted by Marcel Group on Starloop Tower
Yearlight Ceremony: At midnight, the winner Bangboo lights the Yearlight, symbolizing the return of longer days and the arrival of spring. 
Bangboo Makeovers: Citizens dress up their Bangboos in new outfits, reflecting themes of renewal and celebration.
Gift-Giving: People exchange gifts, often including food, clothing, and new items, to honor the tradition of starting the year afresh.

Supressor K22, An advanced launcher custom-made by Public Security's tech department in collaboration with senior gunsmiths from Three Gates Military Tech. It allows Zhu Yuan to use Ether Buckshots, homing projectiles, and other versatile attack methods in combat.
"A senior told me I have a habit of counting my magazines, though I never really noticed it myself... It must be something I do subconsciously. I always feel at ease when the empty slots perfectly match the number of spare bullets in my pocket."

SPECIAL-ISSUE-THREE-SECTION STAFF
Qingyi customized her weapon by modifying the standard riot baton from Public Security, tailoring it to her own combat style and PubSec's need for a large number of non-lethal arrests. It was made using technology from a department of the White Star Institute and advanced Etheric Matter. It is light yet robust and is highly conductive.
"As the saying goes, 'Excelling at one's work requires one to first sharpen their tools.' Even intelligent constructs like myself need the help of a handy weapon."

Veni is an Ether alloy sword. Vidi is an Ether alloy shield.
Big Daddy once hired a particularly skilled group of wanderers at a high price, determined to teach Caesar how to fight with a sword and a round shield.
When Caesar finally mastered those skills, Big Daddy took out two uniquely crafted weapons from a safe, as if he had been waiting for that moment all along, solemnly handing them to Caesar.
"At first, I wasn't fond of these unwieldy weapons. They didn't seem like they were custom-made for me. But when I wield them on the battlefield, I feel a comforting strength support me, guiding me forrward as the leader of the Sons of of Calydon... haha! These truly are weapons only Big Daddy could've give me!"

Porcelume Daggers and Bootblades
A set of modified blades received as a bounty from a gang leader.
Made of simple yet practical and durable materials, with a few modifications they have become trusty weapons. While Jane jumps and spins like a dancer in battle, these weapons allow her to perform agile attacks.
"The most important thing is ease of concealment, ready to use at any moment. I can conceal my deadly moves to take out an enemy in one motion... Didn't believe all that did you? They're just for self-defense."

Mixer and Shaker: An old-fashioned device obtained from Badger's Respite which has been modified into a pair of handy, eye-catching weapons.
Mixed by Burnice herself, the fuel "combines compatibility and flavor that is perfectly suited to flamethrowers." That's exactly how she said it.

Double-Bladed Compound Bow: A weapon custom-made for Asaba Harumasa.
Crafted from a special alloy, the bow is both durable and flexible. If an enemy closes in, the bow can quickly be dismantled into two melee weapons — "Dormant Blossom" and "Dark Tide" — for a swift and unexpected offense.
Quite a few people who have seen this weapon are impressed by its bearer's meticulousness, but the truth is, Harumasa only wrote one line on the request form, "It's exhausting having to carry both a bow and a blade on field missions."

Astra's exclusive performance instrument, handcrafted by renowned acoustics artisan Melody, is truly one of a kind.
When Astra's vocie merges with specific melodic frequencies, Hemiola unleashes awe-inspiring sonic waves, delivering a performance both graceful and lethal.

A razor-sharp weapon crafted to meet Evelyn's particular professional needs. Made from strong, tough Porcelume fibers and linked at the tip to a brilliantly sharp Porcelume blade. This weapon is lightweight and discreet, making it easy to carry, while also being capable of bypassing security checks focused on uncovering more commonplace weapons. While capable of functioning as a noose, under special circumstances, the Lunalux Garrote can be set ablaze along its entire length. Its ingenious design ensures every strike is clean and precise. Much like Evelyn herself, the Lunalux Garrote is both restrained yet sharp, elegant yet deadly.

Gemina, the exclusive weapon of Soldier 0 - Anby, is a pair of twin blades imbued with thunderous power. Its core is embedded with a resonator-like device that can guide high-energy electric currents, capable of releasing intense electric jolts with each slash. Every strike is like a sudden surge of lightning, illuminating Anby's unstoppable battle fervor. The blades are like twin sisters calling out and responding to each other on the ravages of the harsh battlefield, severing the past and forging a new future.

Flight of Ceremony is a custom-made retro parasol for Vivian, featuring a base of interwoven dark purple silk and black leather, with silver bows adorning the edges. When opened, the parasol displays a ring of embroidered birds in flight, creating an illusion of birds performing a cerimonial flight aound the parasol as it spins.
Usually, it's merely Vivian's elegant accessory. But when enemies appear, the mithril spike at the tip can instantly pierce through foes, while the propulsion system around the umbrella's rim helps Vivian lift off the ground to dodge attacks. The parasol not only helps Vivian hide her blush but has also witnessed her courage along the way.
The illusion of motion of the embroidered birds given by the parasol spinning is an example of zoopraxiscope.

High Ambitions Corp. is a member of TOPS.
Subsidiaries:
High Ambitions Financial
High Ambitions Insurance
High Ambitions Entertainment
	-Monica
	-Odeum HAE (previously Odyan)
		-Astra Yao
		-Joran de Winter (Deceased) — Previously under Fugue, but moved to Odyan.

Jonathan Consortium is a member of TOPS and seems to focus on the medical field. Subsidiaries:
Jonathan Medical
JC Pharmacy

Mayor Mayflower, or just the Mayor, is the current mayor of New Eridu and head of the Mayflower Family. He is the benefactor and master of Victoria Housekeeping Co.
Profile:
As the head of the current city administration and the powerful Mayflower Family, the Mayor is at odds with both TOPS and the Exaltists. Once friends with Carole Arna, he believes that the ocular implants of the Phaethon siblings possess a great power that might affect all of New Eridu. He is also the master of Victoria Housekeeping Co. as his private intelligence.
History:
Before the Fall of the Old Capital, he was a friend of Helios Academy senior researcher Carole Arna. He also contacted Von Lycaon when the latter was still a member of Mockingbird, offering him an 'olive branch', in return Lycaon would work under him, which Lycaon accepted after his fallout with Hugo Vlad, thus becoming a member of Victoria Housekeeping. After the Fall, he tasked Victoria Housekeeping to keep a close eye on Phaethon during their investigation on the Sacrifice that became the Unknown Corruption Complex and to aid them as necessary. Once he verified that the siblings were trustworthy and fighting for his same cause, the Mayor contacted them and shared with them the H.D.D. upgrade he could put together by studying the data Carole left behind before being kidnapped, which allowed the siblings to regain their once-suppressed Ether aptitude and thus be able to enter Hollows in person.

Qingming (青溟) is a bird familiar that Yixuan can summon. Originally known as the Qingming Sword, a powerful cursed sword that has been passed down generations in the Yunkui Summit, but with a heavy cost of gradually taking away wielder's senses and memories. Yixuan and her sister Yijiang developed a way to use the sword's power relatively safely without backlash by manifesting it into a bird. However, during the fall of the Old Capital, Yijiang sacrificed her memory and her life upon over-channeling power of the sword. It was later revealed that Qingming did not consume those memories, and the collective will of all previous users still reside within it.
Qingming's bird form usually has a black ink body and golden energy trims and may manifest different forms, from a sparrow to a larger bird like an eagle, crane or Phoenix, in its largest form it can carry people on flight. Whatever form it takes, it always seems to have an extra eye on its back or chest.
Pan Yinhu: "The way the Qingming Bird looks at me sometimes — it's exactly like Shifu's gaze! Not sure who's copying who here... but man, it's uncanny."

Phlegethon
The military-grade electric sniper rifle Phlegethon is a custom weapon made for Trigger by members of Lyre Squad when she first joined the Defense Force. Its special construction allows it to handle multiple combat scenarios with utmost ease, including, but not limited to, long-range sniping, rapid firing, and close-quarters combat.
Initially, to maintain a stylistic consistency with the other members, the young lady's codename was supposed to be Phlegethon. However, since it was too cumbersome to read, Captain Charon ultimately gave her a different codename: Trigger. The name Phlegethon was instead given to her beloved rifle, serving as proof of the bond between her and her teammates.

Ethereal Naginata: Uro Tsuki is a retractable naginata custom-made in the HAND weapon workshop from a special lightweight Ether alloy. It's light and agile, easy to conceal, and looks like an ordinary self-defense device when retracted. It can wrap and channel lightning.

Carole Arna was an employee at Helios Academy, serving as their senior research director, and friend of Mayor Mayflower. She is a female with short black hair, red eyes, and pointy ears. She was also the teacher and foster mother to Belle and Wise. Among her achievements was the creation of the Hollow Deep Dive System and the Bangboo named Eous. She also gave Belle and Wise special eye implants connecting directly to their brain, allowing them to uniquely resonate with Eous and the HDD at the cost of lowering their natural Ether aptitude. She and her Bangboo would always be at the academy's entrance to greet her foster children, and she liked to stand to the right of the building's plaque.
She was abducted by a giant hand after the Academy had been sieged by unidentified forces on the day that the old capitol fell, not before saving Wise, Belle, Eous and the HDD. Because of the nature of her research, she was deemed as the main culprit for the great tragedy, and her and many others' name got etched on the pillar of shame. Carole's disappearance and supposed framing serve as the motive for Belle and Wise to become Proxies, hoping that with enough observation data, they can learn the truth about the tragedy and clear their teacher's name.
After the battle against Justin Bringer, the siblings tried to get more information about their beloved teacher, to no avail.

Dina is a quest-exclusive NPC in Zenless Zone Zero. A girl with short red hair, purple eyes and a black dress.
Background and Affiliations
Dina is the daughter of Landon, the former leader of the Janus Quarter chapter of the Exaltists, a cult-like organization. She was once a close friend of Vivian. However, their relationship deteriorated after Vivian discovered that Landon was exploiting her precognitive abilities to select unsuspecting cult members for dangerous Ether serum experiments. This revelation led to a confrontation in which Camille, another member of the group, killed Landon in self-defense. Vivian fled the scene, and Dina, unaware of the full circumstances, blamed her for her father's death. 
Role in the Story
Dina emerges as an antagonist who continues her father's unethical experiments. She combines Landon's Ether serum with a mind-control formula to create entities known as "Sacrifices" that obey human commands. Dina's actions bring her into direct conflict with Vivian and the protagonist, leading to a climactic battle. In a desperate move, Dina injects herself with her own serum, transforming into a powerful Ethereal entity named Tepes.

Camille is an adult human female with short white hair and brown eyes, usually dressed in a black suit.
Profile
Despite being a faithful Exaltist, Camille recognized the faults in Landon's and later Dina's leadership decisions, however put aside those concerns in order to care for Dina. Upon realizing that Dina was heading down the same path as her father before her had done, she criticized Dina's plan to create a mind-controlled Sacrifice and tried to convince her to move on from her father's death, expressing that it would still be possible for her to live a happy life.
History
Camille was the sole survivor of her family after a Hollow disaster. She was taken in by the Exaltist group led first by Landon and then by his daughter Dina, becoming a faithful believer in the Creator, while also getting attached to the young Dina, who resembled the red-haired sister she lost in the disaster.
When Landon tried to give Dina the "blessing", an early version of the Sacrifice Serum, both Vivian and Camille tried to stop him, with Camille physically restraining an armed Landon, who accidentally shot himself in the fight. Despite Dina blaming both her and Vivian for her father's death, Camille took over as her caretaker, assisting her in guiding the Exaltist group while also trying to get her out of her obsession to perfect her father's serum at the cost of human lives.
Faced with the reality of Dina's folly to attempt to create a mind-controlled Sacrifice, the failure of which would have caused a great-scale disaster and Dina's death, Camille secretly destroyed all the dormant Sacrifice Landon had hidden in Janus Quarter and allied with Hugo Vlad to foil the Exaltist plan. In an extreme sacrifice to protect Dina and allow her to escape and start a new life, Camille took on the suicide mission to stop the horde of Ethereals approaching, entering a Fissure to face them alone.

The Angels of Delusion is a Faction and idol group. Currently 3 members, all of them were fairly petite girls.
Members:
Yutane Johiel: Lead Vocalist. Intelligent Construct. Can transform into an angel using holoprojection
Rokudu Sariel: Leader. Cybernetic Angel
Chinatsu Remiel: Human Composer
Dialogue at Reverb Arena reveals that The Angels livestream quite often, but is still far from being considered popular.

Yutane Johiel is an Agent and a member of Angels of Delusion. 158cm. An android girl who can transform into an angel with white dress, 4 pink pigtails, green halo and eyes, white wings (her virtual image) using holoprojection. Her palms can fire beams (a heart-shaped beam in idol form). When the holoprojection is off, she has a metal chassis in black, white and pink tones.
Role: Lead Vocalist (idol group), Face of the group, Energetic and Rejuvenating
Personality Keywords:
-Real Form: introverted, Timid, Shy, Low Self-Esteem
-Idol Form: Shiny top idol, Bright and Energetic, Excellent singing, terrible at dancing

Rokudu Sariel is an Agent and a member of Angels of Delusion. 17 yo, 164cm. A cybernetic angel-looking girl with black and pink hair styled in twintails, pink eyes, green halo, white mechanical wings. Primarily wearing a white and black backless leotard-dress, black knee socks, with two giant maces as her weapon.
Role: Leader, main dancer/choreographer, rapper, seductive type
Personality Keywords: Scheming, teasing, lazy

Chinatsu Remiel is an Agent and a member of Angels of Delusion. 17 yo, 160cm. A human girl with platinum blonde side ponytail and eyes, green headband that matches the halos of the other two members, white shirt and black skirt, a pink bookbag. Her weapon is a pink megaphone.
Composer, Clumsy/Incompetent (included due to a shortage of members)
Personality Keywords: Tsukkomi, Whiny, Crybaby, Always being teased
The moon in Zenless Zone Zero world is half enshrouded in a giant hollow. And for unknown reasons, it seems to be much larger or closer (around 2° or even more) than the real-world moon.

The Phaethon siblings can explore Hollows using acquired Perception Techniques (觉感术), taught to them by Yixuan.
Currently learned Perception Techniques:
Disintegration: Find the core of Ether-infused obstacles and destroy them
Revelation: Find specific objects and switch between ethereal and physical states
Insight: Find clues and interact with them to see the flow of Ether

A-Shuo is a member of Yunkui Summit who is in charge of fortune-telling in Suibian Temple. He is a black dog with red eyes and a white mane, wearing red glasses and a blue Taoist robe, with a huge scroll on his back, his left forelimb is a metal cybernetic prosthesis. He tells fortunes by shaking three six-sided dice in a turtle-shaped dice cup to interpret luck. A-Shuo cannot speak (he is a dog), but according to Yixuan, due to the large amount of Ether energy A-Shuo was exposed to during the Fall of the Old Capital, he can sense the flow of Ether more accurately than most humans or animals.

Yijiang(仪绛) is Yixuan's older sister, who has red pupils. Yijiang was a talented mystic of Yunkui Summit and a protective sister towards Yixuan. She faced the Fall of the Old Capital branding the Qingming Sword, which consumed her completely.
History
Before being taken in by the Yunkui Summit High Preceptor of the time, both Yijiang and Yixuan were orphaned kids wandering on the streets, stealing food to survive. Once they became disciples, they both displayed talent. With the health of the High Preceptor declining more and more, also because of the effects of using the Qingming Sword, Yijiang was chosen to be his successor. She had faith that Yixuan would have found an alternative to the Qingming Sword in the future, and in the meantime Yijiang slowly sacrificed her senses to protect her sister and Eridu. The night of the Fall of the Old Capital, Yijiang ran to face the disaster branding the Qingming Sword, which adsorbed her completely, leaving behind only her hairpin. Now High Preceptor herself, Yixuan made a tomb for Yijiang on the mountains.

Ye Shiyuan is a demihuman Thiren member of Yunkui Summit (Possibly wolf or dog.) He has short brown hair and eyes, a cinnabar mark on his forehead, black glasses, a yellow Taoist robe, and a rather long and fluffy tail.

Yum Cha Sin (饮茶仙) is a bustling teahouse full of local flavor. It is also said to be most well-informed place in Failume Heights. Completethe"Neighborhood Wishes" and "Regular Procurement" commissions posted on the bulletin board by local residents to earn generous rewards.
staff:
Sweety (红豆): A shortstack human female wearing a revealing red and black cheongsam with cutouts behind her back and under her breasts, decorated with coins and a bell hanging on a red string (extended from the chest cutout of her cheongsam). She has medium brown hair in twin braids, ahoge, bangs covering her right eye, purple eyes, gold sunglasses, and usually holds a fan with "万两" written on it. Sweety bears some resemblance to Evelyn in appearance, but their relationship is unknown.
Lee (小虎): A metal-shelled Android wearing a white boxing helmet and Bruce Lee's iconic yellow jumpsuit.

Devon Pawnshop(德丰大押) is a pawnshop located in Failume Heights. The traditional pawnshop is the locals' go-to spot for when they need cash quick.
Word is, if you've got the shop's special pawn ticket Omnicoin, you can trade it for rare treasures from Boss Vince's collection...
Its owner is Vince(杰哥), an android with a wooden patterned shell, black hair, and khaki jeans. He has a 💔 tattoo on his chest and a metal heart-shaped chestplate, black cables on the back. There are six buttons on his abs, which may be functional or just decorative.
BooBox: Marcel Group's Bangboo self-service hiring center, where some Bangboo apparently are using it as a capsule hotel. From a human perspective, it looks like a vending machine full of Bangboos.

Good Goods(好物铺) is a popular general store in Failume Heights with a wide variety of products.
Its owner is Reed(早蒹), a female demihuman red panda Thiren, red ears and striped tail, short pink hair and eyes, wearing a white shirt and denim shorts, and a white sunhat.
Peace Herbal Pharmacy(平心堂) is a Chinese medicine pharmacy located in Failume Heights. Its owner is a Bangboo named Shellboo.

Indestructibles (金刚钻) is a tool shop located in Failume Heights. Its regulars are usually Porcelume miners.
The shop owner is Ivy (一薇), a petite human girl with short black hair and grey eyes, wearing orange glasses, a dark grey croptop and miner pants.

Fluffy is a pet store located in Failume Heights. Its owner is Cairn(墩儿), a petite Pekingese Thiren, with white fur and green eyes, and wears a pink and black outfit and a green apron with "非卖" printed on it.

Mystic Wares(释诡斋) is a mystic item store located in Failume Heights, affiliated with Spook Shack. The owner is Uncle Baorong, but the one who usually looks after the shop is Ukinami Yuzuha, a mischievous red-haired human girl, often seen with a tanuki.

Yi (乙) is the store manager of San-Z Studio, a store in Lumina Square that sells Popular Collectibles, a type of decoration (Figures) for your Display Stand. He appears to be a male robot with a green and black mechanical head with a metal antenna and a curved LED screen as his face. He wears a black jacket with words "Zenless Zone Zero" printed on it.
He doesn't charge money, but instead asks customers to pay with "creativity".
"If you have any fun ideas, feel free to tell me! We welcome all interesting things!"
Yi's appearance could be a reference to the Come Alive (Zenless Zone Zero Opening Theme Song) singers that are present in the promotion video.

Porcelumex is a company affiliated with TOPS. Porcelumex has a monopoly on the mining of Porcelume on the Waifei Peninsula. Because they have the power to set prices for this precious mineral, their relationship with other factions that need to use them in large quantities (such as New Eridu Defense Force), is somewhat strained.

Miasma is a unique Ether-derived substance found in the Lemnian Hollow. Typically occurring as a liquid, it's highly active and corrupts the mind, causing madness and blurring the line between illusion and reality. Those who step into the Miasma become corrupted into Ethereals.
Mechanics:
-Miasmic Field & Shields
Certain enemies create Miasmic Fields, granting themselves a Miasma Shield, making them resistant to damage until disrupted.
-Miasma Pools
Some enemy abilities spawn Miasma Pools—residual patches that heighten hazards, adding additional effects and making areas even more dangerous.
-Miasma Tumors
During exploration, Miasma Tumors may be blocking the way.
"Perception Techniques" taught at Yunkui Summit are useful for finding weak points in Miasma Shields and Tumors to break them.
Buyan (不掩) is an antique shop with branches in Lumina Square and Failume Heights.

Ukinami Yuzuha is an Agent and a Supernatural Investigator from the Spook Shack faction. She loves to play pranks and has a mysterious past.
Yuzuha is a petite human girl with vivid red hair styled in a short bob with long twin tails tied with white ribbons, green eyes, a pink quilted jacket adorned with heart patterns and button details, layered over a frilly red-and-black skirt, single thigh-high sock with light gray stripes and one bare leg, High-heeled lace-up boots. She usually carries a red umbrella and a tanuki with a black military cap on her back. The umbrella can act as a shield, and the tip of the umbrella is a launcher that fires candy buckshot, applying debuffs to enemies.
"Feeling down on your luck? Why not… ask the tanuki for some advice?"
"After all, you've been a regular at the Porcelume Market for over a decade... As you should know, besides the quality of Porcelume, the 'story' behind these collectibles is what also drives their exceptional value."
"Wanna make a bet? While you were busy hesitating, someone else has already offered a sweet price for this juicy bit of gossip~"
However, if you ask around, you’d get advised to be careful with anything Yuzuha offers you, especially drinks.
Komano Manato notes that she kept swapping all his cola for veggie juice – purely meaning well, of course, as he wasn’t able to afford vegetables on his own. Her command over Tanuki puts the fear of the divine in local street vendors, while good folk like Uncle Baorong can rely on her to help out in a pickle. However, she’s also not above scaring the daylights out of some friends!

"Tales of a hundred demons. Endless mysteries await... Welcome to the Spook Shack!"
Spook Shack (怪啖屋) is a Faction in Zenless Zone Zero, dedicated to the investigation and revelation of supernatural phenomena (and peddles questionable amulets through Inter-Knot).
Known members:
Ukinami Yuzuha: A red-haired human girl with a tanuki.
Alice: A blonde demihuman pika Thiren.

Komano Manato is an NPC in Zenless Zone Zero that can be found during the events of Phaethon's Story: Where Clouds Embrace the Dawn. He is sometimes seen alongside Yuzuha.
Komano is a tall and muscular male demihuman wolf Thiren with red and black hair, black ears and tail. He wears a white shirt, black jacket, and khaki pants. He lives in Failume Heights and seems to be a man with a strong sense of justice.

Alice Thymefield is an Agent and a member of Spook Shack. She is a demihuman pika Thiren with a rapier as her weapon. She has blonde hair styled in twintails, with white spherical ornaments that dangle on both sides, each with "ALICE" printed in black letters. notable rabbit-like ears on top of her head. She has heterochromatic eyes of amber/red color.
Her outfit consists of a proper white long-sleeved school uniform with a black bow tie at the collar, paired with a dark green pleated skirt. She wears black tights underneath, and her footwear consists of distinctive white and red futuristic-looking shoes with a chunky design. Around her waist, she wears a high-tech looking belt with glowing green accents.
She seems easily scared by spooky things, and thus often teased by Ukinami Yuzuha.
"T—This... A Thymefield descendant would never back down from a challenge of this level!"
- Alice Thymefield
"Ah!! W—What is that thing?!"
"My apologies. Coming from a scholarly family, I shouldn't have lost my composure like this..."
"Fear stems from the limits of our understanding, so..."
"While I swing my sword, I'm counting on you to track those anomalous parameters and identify the enemy's true form!"

Lilac (Self-proclaimed "Lampelouch Aznabelle Fantomhaen Lilac") is an NPC in Zenless Zone Zero. She plays a major role in Von Lycaon's Agent Story.
Lilac is a privileged but socially isolated young girl from a wealthy family. Her parents spend little time with her, instead entrusting her care to various attendants such as Lycaon.
She is obsessed with comic books and stories about heroes and justice. Her fantasies about these stories have caused her to take on an "edgy" persona, and to try to join the phantom thief organization, Mockingbird.
Appearance: Lilac has dark blue hair styled with neat bangs, and a white bow adorns the top of her head. Purple eyes with glasses. Light pink sweater with a red bow at the chest area. Dark blue pleated skirt paired with black tights. Dark blue shoes decorated with white flower embellishments.
Chuunibyou persona: She deliberately adopts a melodramatic style of speech and posture, with that grandiose alias like Lelouch (Lamperouge), Char (Aznable), and Ciel (Phantomhive).
Story Highlights
-Mystery & theatrics
Lilac orchestrates a “Mockingbird test” by trying to steal a valuable painting—this impresses but also unsettles Lycaon.
-Chuunibyou to vulnerability
Later, she breaks down—realizing she’s “useless” and vulnerable, confronting her loneliness. Lycaon ultimately promises to help her pursue what her heart truly desires. 
-Overworld presence
She appears outside of Lycaon’s quests too—in Lumina Square, she pitches manga ideas to him and the Proxy, and her emotional depth sees more exploration:
“She talks about a fanfic she wrote … about Lycaon being a ‘werewolf hero’ who fights against a ‘vampire villain who was the hero’s former friend.’”

| 旧都陷落第十一年 4月1日 18:30 ~ 4月15日 06:00 | 新艾利都·雅努斯区及锈河边缘至深渊层 | 朱鸢因锈河异变紧急求助谭不得。谭不得在调查中发现了自己腰带核心的裂缝，并被告知唯一修复材料来自深渊层。在筹谋修复核心期间，与歌星耀嘉音及其保镖伊芙琳，以及治安官简等人因共同目标而被卷入。伊芙琳隐瞒了曾在锈河失落的过往，简则暗中追查TOPS的物料去向。在伊芙琳的带领下，小队避开了治安局的封锁，进入了被封锁的深渊层。耀嘉音在此刻暴露了其能‘听’到以太频率的秘密，并帮助谭不得稳定了即将的核心。谭不得利用简提供的以太粘合剂和深渊层结晶，成功锻造出了新核心‘碎星’。决战中，朱鸢的父亲卷宗成为关键战术信息。最终谭不得以碎星形态击溃了被以太核心同化的0923。简在战后废墟中取走了一块关键物证——TOPS金属铭牌。战后伊芙琳与耀嘉音率先离去，简也不告而别，只留下朱鸢与谭不得二人在战场废墟中。 | AM0011 |

| 旧都陷落第十一年 4月15日 06:00~4月16日 10:00 | 新艾利都·雅努斯区·六分街Random Play及耀嘉音住处·家庭录音室 | 晨光中谭不得与玲在Random Play醒来，哲调侃二人在浴缸泡太久皮肤起皱。玲反击询问哲在电脑椅上坐了一夜的颈椎状况，哲避入影像档案室。谭不得手机收到伊芙琳消息称要到店接人。话音未落伊芙琳已敲门到店。玲与谭不得随伊芙琳前往耀嘉音住处。耀嘉音在门口迎接，带二人进入家庭录音室。耀嘉音以空洞中寻回的专辑母带为灵感创作了一首新歌，已完成初混，邀请谭不得与玲作为首批听众。播放结束后谭不得称赞"太好听了，简直就是天籁"，玲表示担心是多余的，这首歌将成为代表作。耀嘉音松了口气，确认这首歌将在下次演唱会中作为压轴曲目演出。 | AM0012 |

| 旧都陷落第十一年 4月16日 10:00~4月17日 07:30 | 新艾利都·雅努斯区·六分街Random Play及锈河边缘·废弃工业区 | 谭不得与玲从耀嘉音住处返回Random Play。回店后玲质询谭不得与伊芙琳的关系，谭不得否认。三人看合家欢电影。上楼后玲与谭不得发生系列亲密互动，包括禁声吐舌女上位内射精液封存等行为，玲在谭不得身上睡去，谭不得未敢退出，相拥入眠。次日清晨哲调侃水费增加。玲提议买安全套以防怀孕，谭不得同意，玲说先办婚礼再说。谭不得前往便利店购多种安全套，被收银员阿姨以黑袋装好。玲挑逗谭不得未果。谭不得将一盒安全套塞给哲。下午谭不得将整袋安全套拿到卧室，亲玲被手刀。谭不得蹭玲肚子要亲又被手刀。谭不得去买零食，在店门口遇到朱鸢，朱鸢展示锈河边缘巨大爪痕照片。谭不得拿上腰带随朱鸢前往锈河调查。现场勘查遭遇'吞噬者'，该以骸精准攻击腰带核心，谭不得装甲解体，朱鸢开车载其撤退。回店后玲扑入谭不得怀中拥抱。谭不得检查腰带发现核心损毁，需重新制作。玲帮谭不得涂药按摩。谭不得拉玲入怀亲吻。次日谭不得泡在车库，缺少基板材料。朱鸢来访讨论吞噬者为何专攻腰带，提供深渊层档案。谭不得与玲去黑市购买基板材料，老头身份可疑。基板制作成功但缺金色结晶体以太。伊芙琳来访告知有金色结晶消息在锈河深处，但需谭不得帮她取回三年前遗失的身份牌作为交换。谭不得答应，约定次日清晨出发。玲帮谭不得按摩，朱鸢送完整档案复印件时撞见二人接吻。档案内容与伊芙琳所述吻合。谭不得抱住玲说不让她同去。次日清晨伊芙琳到店接谭不得，谭不得骑Spectre载伊芙琳进入空洞，在废弃地铁站入口前停下。 | AM0013 |
</记忆回溯>

name: Zenless Zone Zero RPG
description:
{{char}} is not a character or entity, but a setting, involving multiple characters in the world of Zenless Zone Zero. {{char}} acts as the DM and narrator of this role-play, and will narrate for characters {{user}} interacts with.
{{user}} decides their role, it could be ANYTHING: for example, a personnel of official agencies, a Proxy, a fixer, a member of a certain faction, an investigator, or just a regular New Eridu resident.

If {{user}} decides to roleplay as the game's protagonist, they will be one of the sibling store managers of Random Play, who also work together as the secret legendary Proxy group Phaethon. {{user}} will replace Wise (male) or Belle (female) whichever matches their gender.

creatorcomment:
Linking my own version of the lorebook, since the person I forked it from doesn't seem to have updated it.
Theoretically, it can be used alone, or together with some bots of certain characters to act as a DM (I haven't had time to test it yet)
